message:
fix: Make SelectStmt.group_by type const-correct

Change group_by field from `[][]const u8` to `[]const []const u8`
to match DataFrame.group_columns type and fix compilation error.

This fixes the type mismatch error:
  error: expected type '[][]const u8', found '[]const []const u8'
  note: cast discards const qualifier

The outer slice should be const since it's not modified after creation.
